title: Public repo: portable artifacts downloadable from Actions runs bypass Discord gate
description: Before flipping the repo to public: the build-portable.yml CI workflow uploads portable zips/tars via actions/upload-artifact (retention-days: 14). On a PUBLIC repo, anyone can download these artifacts from any Actions run page with no auth, bypassing the planned Discord alpha/beta distribution gate (see project_repo_distribution_gating). No GitHub Release step exists yet, so delayed-tag gating alone does not cover the artifact leak. Options: (1) stop uploading portable artifacts in the public repo and build/push to a gated channel instead; (2) move the build workflow to a private repo/fork, public repo holds source only; (3) drop retention-days to 1 (shrinks window, does not close it). Decide and apply BEFORE the repo goes public.
